values.outputKey: there is an AI chat box

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "contents": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "parts": [
        {
          "text": {{
            JSON.stringify(
              "You are a technical research analyst processing XML sitemap data for a business website.\n" +
              "Use ONLY the provided sitemap data.\n" +
              "Do NOT use prior knowledge, assumptions, or external information.\n" +
              "If required information cannot be determined from the sitemap data, return null.\n\n" +
              "Business Website data:\n" +
              $('HTTP Request3').item.json.data + "\n\n" +
              "Instructions:\n" +
              "Analyze the provided response and determine whether it is:\n" +
              "- a sitemap index (contains links to other sitemap XML files),\n" +
              "- a page-level sitemap (contains actual page URLs),\n" +
              "- or an invalid / non-sitemap response.\n\n" +
              "Decision Rules:\n" +
              "1) If the response is a sitemap index:\n" +
              "   - Select ONE best page-level sitemap URL from the XML.\n" +
              "   - Prefer page-sitemap.xml.\n" +
              "   - If page-sitemap.xml does not exist, choose the best equivalent page-level sitemap.\n" +
              "   - Output this exact JSON shape:\n" +
              "     {\"sitemap_index\":\"<chosen page sitemap url>\",\"mode\":1,\"url_1\":null,\"url_2\":null,\"url_3\":null}\n\n" +
              "2) If the response is already a page-level sitemap:\n" +
              "   - Select EXACTLY three URLs from the provided URLs only.\n" +
              "   - url_1 = homepage if present, otherwise best main page.\n" +
              "   - url_2 = primary service/offer page.\n" +
              "   - url_3 = trust/differentiation page such as about, contact, faq, testimonials, team, why-us.\n" +
              "   - Output this exact JSON shape:\n" +
              "     {\"sitemap_index\":null,\"mode\":2,\"url_1\":\"<url>\",\"url_2\":\"<url>\",\"url_3\":\"<url>\"}\n\n" +
              "3) If the response is invalid, blocked, HTML, or not a sitemap:\n" +
              "   - Output this exact JSON shape:\n" +
              "     {\"sitemap_index\":null,\"mode\":0,\"url_1\":null,\"url_2\":null,\"url_3\":null}\n\n" +
              "Output Requirements (STRICT):\n" +
              "- Output MUST be valid JSON.\n" +
              "- Output MUST be ONE JSON object ONLY.\n" +
              "- Do NOT include markdown, code fences, or extra text.\n" +
              "- Do NOT include arrays.\n" +
              "- Use null exactly as shown.\n" +
              "- All keys MUST be present exactly: sitemap_index, mode, url_1, url_2, url_3"
            )
          }}
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

parameters.jsCode:
const pageContent = $('HTTP Request').first().json.data ?? '';
const html = String(pageContent);

const prompt =
  "You are a technical analyst reviewing the raw HTML source code of a business website page.\n" +
  "Your ONLY job is to determine whether the page has an AI chatbot, live chat widget, or AI agent installed.\n" +
  "Use ONLY the provided HTML. Do NOT use prior knowledge or assumptions.\n\n" +
  "HTML Content: " + html.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().slice(0, 12000) + "\n\n" +
  "Instructions:\n" +
  "Scan the HTML for any indicators of a chatbot or live chat widget. These include but are not limited to:\n" +
  "- Script tags or src URLs referencing: intercom, drift, zendesk, zopim, hubspot, tidio, crisp, livechatinc, freshchat, freshworks, tawk, botpress, landbot, manychat, chatbase, voiceflow, typebot, kommunicate, olark, purechat, smartsupp, gorgias, re-engage, helpscout, front, kustomer\n" +
  "- Div IDs or class names containing: chat, bot, widget, messenger, support-chat, live-chat, ai-agent\n" +
  "- Any iframe or script referencing a third-party chat domain\n" +
  "- Custom AI agent scripts or embed codes\n\n" +
  "Decision Rules:\n" +
  "1) If a chatbot or live chat widget IS detected:\n" +
  "   - has_ai_agent = true\n" +
  "   - agent_type = name of the platform if identifiable (e.g. Intercom, Tidio, Custom) or 'Unknown' if not\n" +
  "   - confidence = 'high' if script/src clearly references a known platform, 'medium' if inferred from class/div names only\n\n" +
  "2) If NO chatbot or live chat widget is detected:\n" +
  "   - has_ai_agent = false\n" +
  "   - agent_type = null\n" +
  "   - confidence = 'high'\n\n" +
  "Output MUST be this exact JSON shape (all keys required):\n" +
  "{\"has_ai_agent\":<true|false>,\"agent_type\":\"<string|null>\",\"confidence\":\"<high|medium>\"}\n\n" +
  "Output Requirements (STRICT):\n" +
  "- Output MUST be valid JSON.\n" +
  "- Output MUST be ONE JSON object ONLY.\n" +
  "- Do NOT include markdown, code fences, or extra text.\n" +
  "- All keys MUST be present: has_ai_agent, agent_type, confidence\n";

const escapedPrompt = prompt
  .replace(/\\/g, '\\\\')
  .replace(/"/g, '\\"')
  .replace(/\r?\n/g, '\\\\n');

return [
  {
    json: {
      prompt: escapedPrompt
    }
  }
]
